svg.text: Each novelty closes ≥1 critical gap and adds a distinct publishable contribution

g.text: N1 — Adaptive RAG with concept-drift detection (closes G4)
Replace static FAISS index with a continual-learning pipeline: monthly arXiv + GitHub changelog ingestion,
embedding drift detection (cosine shift threshold), and automated re-indexing. Add a temporal weight
decay so older concept pairs contribute less to top-k ranking. Track taxonomy evolution over time.
N2 — Multi-LLM comparative evaluation (closes G2)
Run the same 50-query benchmark across GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Llama-3-70B, and Mistral-7B.
Report inter-model agreement (Fleiss κ) alongside IR metrics. Show which taxonomy categories benefit
most from model size, and where smaller open-weight models achieve parity — critical for on-prem deployment.
N3 — Counterfactual traceability engine (closes G3, G5)
Extend RAG outputs with causal reasoning: "If you adopt GitOps (DevOps), which MSA practices must
change, and what are the expected DORA metric impacts?" Ground this in the industrial dataset with
actual pre/post DORA measurements (deployment freq, MTTR, change-failure rate) from case companies.
N4 — Voice agent integration layer (closes G6 — entirely new contribution)
Design a DevOps–MSA voice agent prompt framework using the taxonomy as a knowledge backbone.
Map each of the 5 taxonomy categories to conversational intent slots. Build an ASR→NLU→RAG→TTS
pipeline where engineers can query DevOps/MSA guidance through speech during incident response.
N5 — Graph-augmented RAG (GraphRAG) over MSA dependency topology (closes G3)
Replace flat FAISS retrieval with a knowledge graph (Neo4j or NetworkX) where nodes = canonical
concepts and edges = evidence-tagged relationships. Use graph traversal (BFS/DFS + PageRank) to
surface multi-hop reasoning: CI/CD → Service Mesh → Zero-Trust → Policy-as-Code chain.
N6 — Controlled RCT-style evaluation in enterprise DevOps transformations (closes G5)
Partner with 2+ enterprises for a pre-registered quasi-experiment: RAG-assisted planning group vs.
control (documentation-only). Measure DORA four keys at T=0, T=3mo, T=6mo. Register on OSF
pre-registration. This makes the industrial contribution publishable as primary empirical research.
